parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ statements: [{ statement: `MATCH (s:Microservice {name: '${$json.target}'}) OPTIONAL MATCH (s)-[:HOSTED_ON]->(srv:Server) OPTIONAL MATCH (upstream:Microservice)-[:DEPENDS_ON*1..5]->(s) RETURN s.name AS service, s.status AS current_status, srv.name AS server, srv.ip AS server_ip, collect(DISTINCT upstream.name) AS upstream_services`, resultDataContents: ['row'] }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ statements: [{ statement: `MATCH (s:Microservice {name: '${$json.service}'}) SET s.status = '${$json.action === 'restore' ? 'active' : 'quarantined'}', s.quarantined_at = datetime(), s.quarantined_by = '${$json.operator}' RETURN s.name AS service, s.status AS status`, resultDataContents: ['row'] }] }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, error: $json.error || 'Invalid remediation request' }) }}
